Apr. 15, 2024 Symptoms of Pink Eye Common pink eye symptoms include eye redness or swelling. Some symptoms can vary by cause. Apr. 15, 2024 How to Prevent Pink Eye Learn how to prevent catching and spreading pink eye. Apr. 15, 2024 How to Treat Pink Eye Pink eye is treatable, and some types can be managed at home without medical treatment. Apr. 15, 2024 Pink Eye: Causes and How It Spreads Learn about common causes of pink eye like viruses, bacteria, and allergens. Apr. 15, 2024 Protect Yourself From Pink Eye Infographic Print resource about how to protect yourself and others from getting pink eye. Apr. 15, 2024 Newborns Pink Eye in Newborns Learn about how newborn babies can get pink eye, and how to prevent and treat infection. Learn More Apr. 15, 2024 For Professionals Clinical Overview of Pink Eye (Conjunctivitis) Learn about the different causes and types of conjunctivitis and how to treat and counsel patients. Learn More Apr. 15, 2024 Conjunctivitis (Pink Eye)  Pink eye is one of the most common and treatable eye conditions. Pink eye caused by viruses and bacteria is very contagious.
